flavorText: Moon druids master powerful shapeshifting forms for frontline combat.

features.description: You can use Wild Shape as a bonus action, cast certain spells while shifted, and expend spell slots to heal 1d8 hit points per slot level while in Wild Shape.
Your Wild Shape CR limit increases to CR 3 at 6th level, CR 5 at 10th level, and follows the Moon cap at 14th level (starting from CR 1 at 2nd level).
Expend two uses of Wild Shape to transform into an air, earth, fire, or water elemental.
You can cast alter self at will, showcasing complete mastery over mutable form.

moon-combat-wild-shape.summary: Convert Wild Shape into a real combat mode with faster activation and in-form sustain options.
moon-combat-wild-shape.description: Combat Wild Shape is the Moon identity switch. It turns form play from scouting utility into a frontline loop with better action economy and emergency slot-to-heal conversion while shifted.
moon-combat-wild-shape.usage: Spend 1 Wild Shape use to transform as a bonus action. While transformed, Moon features can improve healing and combat posture.
moon-combat-wild-shape.recovery: Wild Shape uses recover on short or long rest per rules layer.

moon-circle-forms.summary: Your Wild Shape form ceiling scales aggressively so beast forms stay combat-relevant through mid tiers.
moon-circle-forms.description: Circle Forms increases the maximum beast form challenge quickly (CR 1 at 2nd, CR 3 at 6th, CR 5 at 10th, and Moon cap by 14th). This is the scaling backbone that keeps Moon druids battle-ready.
moon-circle-forms.effect: Moon Wild Shape CR scaling: 2nd→CR1, 6th→CR3, 10th→CR5, 14th→Moon cap.

moon-elemental-wild-shape.summary: Spend two Wild Shape uses to become an elemental for major resistance and battlefield presence spikes.
moon-elemental-wild-shape.description: Elemental Wild Shape is the subclass breakout moment. It trades resource efficiency for encounter-shaping forms and should read as a deliberate high-impact mode switch.
moon-elemental-wild-shape.usage: Spend 2 Wild Shape uses to take an elemental form.

moon-thousand-forms.summary: Alter your appearance with effortless primal fluidity whenever disguise or adaptation matters.
moon-thousand-forms.description: Thousand Forms is a high-level expression of shapeshifting mastery. It expands the circle beyond combat and into social infiltration, mystery, and constant adaptive identity.
